mapper.select: SELECT id, dimension_code, value_code, value_name, physical_value, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_dimension_value WHERE dimension_code = #{dimensionCode} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT id, dimension_code, value_code, value_name, physical_value, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_dimension_value WHERE is_deleted = false AND dimension_code IN #{code}

SELECT v.id, v.value_name, v.description, d.dimension_name AS dimension_name FROM agent.dsl_dimension_value v LEFT JOIN agent.dsl_dimension d ON v.dimension_code = d.dimension_code AND d.is_deleted = false WHERE v.is_deleted = false AND v.embedding IS NULL
